reviews.review_description: If running back and forth from  one of only a couple rooms and a hallway with no ending other than being killed is your idea of fun, then here you go. There is no resolution.

I think I downloaded a teaser  version of this game.  It is only 46 megabits and I am getting  nowhere 2ith it. Can't even find one piece of  the  picture.  Can you please help?
Does any one read these? I left  this over a week  ago! Need some help  please.

developer_response.body: Well this game was compressed to optimise user experience. We cannot disclose the location of hidden objects! Thats the fun part! You can watch some YouTube videos. Other gamers might have found what you're looking for, But that would be a Spoiler for the gaming experiences.

reviews.review_description: The sound is so squawking and ear piercing. It needs to be set so we can hear the narrative story and not find the experience uncomfortable.
This game is too scary, can't finish this game, dear developers do you mind putting little cute bears and heart every now and then.

developer_response.body: Dear Gamer, Thanks for your kind & honest review. You just make our day a bit brighter! Thanks again. We will keep your 'suggestions' in mind - How about something like Cabin fever? Take care.

reviews.review_title: I can't find all the pieces.
reviews.review_description: The monster always kill me. There's  any whalktrouthg anywhere?

developer_response.body: Dear gamer, Thanks for showing interest. The monster always kills you! That's what they do! What you should is play the game more and look for the clues. Hope you would enjoy it more to rank it to five stars. Sorry we can't spoil this game by showing you all the hidden pieces, and we hope you understand that. Please play and enjoy the game and thanks for purchasing our dream.

reviews.review_description: I think this is really cool concept , love the creepy noises, colors  and theme but the only thing i could critique  is i would like more jump scares thsn what I've experienced . I would recommend this to everyone tho, its alot of fun!!!

developer_response.body: Dear Gamer, Thanks for the compliment! We really do appreciate. No game is 100% perfect for everyone, But we will definitely take your advice seriously and try to add more Jump scares, unfortunately we need our whole team involvement which we cannot effort at this point.

reviews.review_description: It's more than a horror game. More mature and fun. I loved it and never expected anything like this.

developer_response.body: It's Our way of saying Thank you to a horror Legend. Thanks Man!

reviews.review_description: I had to download it while in the Gear VR. Great game! It creates a good amount of panic and keeps you uneasy throughout the entire experience. Well done!

developer_response.body:
Dear gamer, Thanks for showing interest in our game. We really expect an honest review and hope you will update the 1 star status after solving your download problem. Now please rethink: Does our game responsible or can even help you with your download problem? 9 hours back you bought it from store but till now many units sold and the last reviewer "LarsWegner" left a 5 star review only 46 minutes ago, You can check that by yourself.
There could be many reasons for interrupted downloads, like Low disk space or bad bandwidth. You can mail Oculus to resolve the later issue. 
We sincerely hope you and your wife shall have a good entertainment out of Corridor of Doom. Thanks and looking forward for an honest review this time.

reviews.review_description: I can't pick up anything except the same piece of the painting from the same place each time I go around and around in a circle. How does this game operate? I am using the GO controller. It might be a cool game, I don't know. Where does the stuff go when you pick it up?
💖I would love to play this game my friends. But your game froze up on me and then it just shut down on me.💖Please fix this game for me please.💖Your friend Rosanna.
